case_title: FRANK BACHORSKI VS. TOYS 'R' US-DELAWARE, INC, A DELAWARE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BACHORSKI, FRANK AS TO DEFENDANT TOYS 'R' US-DELAWARE, INC, A DELAWARE CORPORATION DBA BABIES "R" US JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
